title: The Mysterious Death of a Socialite

scenes.text: A celebrated socialite's life ended in uncertainty.
It happened in New York City, in 1947.
The body of Mary Jane Kelly was found in her apartment, raising more questions than answers.
Despite multiple investigations, the cause of her death is still unknown.
scenes.label: CAUSE UNKNOWN

scenes.text: Follow because some cases still need answers.

description: 📍 New York City, USA - 1947. Mary Jane Kelly, a prominent socialite, was found dead in her apartment, and the details remain a tragic enigma. Follow for daily cold cases!
